summary: Owner accepted the complete H2 Social Media Management System staged product and operating package.
notes: This closes the H2 staged-product milestone and moves the project from planned to active in managed_staging. It does not authorize OAuth, social account connection, posting, scheduling, analytics, DMs/comments, n8n activation, credentials, paid tools, production deployment, domain/DNS, production/customer data, Lead Gen changes, AI Receptionist changes, Constitution changes, accepted lessons, standing approvals, or any approval bypass.
